zh.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson於1445年出生。他和Lady Mary Duchess of York至少有1個兒子。他去世於1478年享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson于1445年出生。他和Lady Mary Duchess of York至少有1个儿子。他去世于1478年享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilkinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic (‘son of Wilkin’) from Wilkin . Compare Wilkerson .

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.

variants.name: Wilkerson
meanings: English (East Anglia and South East Midlands): from Middle English Wilkeson, a shortened form of Wilkinson , ‘son of Wilkin or young William’. The -r- is intrusive.

variants.name: Wilkison
meanings: English and Scottish: shortened form of Wilkinson or a variant of Wilkieson from the medieval personal name Wilky + -son, meaning ‘son of Wilky’. Compare Wilkie 1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: "Duke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: In modern use this normally represents a coinage parallel to   Earl   and   King  , but it has been used as a short form of   Marmaduke   from at least the early 1600s.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: York"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a local name from the city in north-eastern England. The place name was originally Eburacon, a derivative of a Welsh word meaning ‘yew’. The Anglo-Saxon settlers changed this to Old English Eoforwīc ‘boar farm’, which in Old Norse became Iorvík or Iork.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson was born in 1445. He had at least 1 son with Lady Mary Duchess of York. He died in 1478, at the age of 33.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson est né en 1445. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Mary Duchess of York. Il est décédé en 1478, à l’âge de 33 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson wurde 1445 geboren. Er hatte mit Lady Mary Duchess of York mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1478 im Alter von 33 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson è nato il nel 1445. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady Mary Duchess of York. Morì nel 1478, all'età di 33 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinsonは1445年に生まれた。彼はLady Mary Duchess of Yorkとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1478年に33歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson(은)는 1445년 태어났다. 그는 Lady Mary Duchess of York(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1478년 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson nasceu em 1445. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady Mary Duchess of York. Ele faleceu em 1478, com 33 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson родился в 1445 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Mary Duchess of York. Он умер в 1478 г. в возрасте 33 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas "Duke of York" Wilkinson nació en 1445. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady Mary Duchess of York. Murió en 1478, a la edad de 33 años.
